note: Every prediction has either a reviewed direct X status or an honest live from:peterxing search. Reviewed @peterxing activity is preferred; authoritative external posts are explicitly labeled direct, scenario, or leading-indicator evidence. Claim-specific guards apply to direct and family matching, and no status is reused more than 3 times.
